problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
mechanism: Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix
hypothesis: The key to How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? is Carbon nanotube alignment in polymer matrix — specifically Carbon nanotube alignment — which would help 3,000,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
